title: pilosella cana
intro: Pilosella cana, also known as Roseroot, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella cana include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and boosting the immune system. Pilosella cana is often prepared as a tincture or tea, and can also be consumed as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
